name: Slack Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures Slack workspace access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT s.id, s.email, s.real_name, e.termination_date FROM slack_users s JOIN employees e ON s.email = e.work_email WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND s.deleted = false
remediation: Deactivate Slack accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours of termination.
